chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-1968 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 20.09.2024. Mr. Sajid Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. ---- Through this Constitutional Petition, the Petitioner seeks direction for regularization of his service with Sui Southern Gas Company Limited (SSGCL). The maintainability of a Petition on this score has already been decided by a larger three Member Bench of this Court in C. P. No.875 of 2020 and other connected Petitions, where it was held that Article 199 of the Constitution cannot be invoked for such purpose in the absence of a statutory basis for the claim. The instant Petition thus stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
